fn build_string(n: usize) -> String {
    let mut result = String::new();
    for i in 0..n {
        result = format!("{}{}", result, i);
    }
    result
}

fn collect_growing(n: usize) -> Vec<u64> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    for i in 0..n {
        result = result.into_iter().chain(std::iter::once(i as u64)).collect();
    }
    result
}
